who: medical billing specialists in small clinics processing 5–15 claims/month
offer: For medical billing specialists in small clinics processing 5–15 claims/month, inaccurate coding causes delayed payments. We simplify claim submissions instead of manual coding and submission processes.
problem: Inaccurate coding leads to claim denials and delayed payments.
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for medical billing specialists
Indie Hackers posts on medical billing challenges

Community forums for sharing medical billing tools
try_it: Let users try manual entry of billing codes on 1-3 items
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path

Short demo video showing the manual-first workflow
Collect 10 short interviews from target users
